reviews.comment:
Poca espera, baños limpios. Pague con la app pero no se cargo el descuento ACA y tuve que esperar 20 minutos para que puedan aplicar el descuento. Culparon la app.

(Translated by Google)
Short wait, clean restrooms. I paid with the app but the ACA discount wasn't applied and I had to wait 20 minutes for them to apply it. They blamed the app.
